name: Chocolate Cheese Mousse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 1/4 cup skim milk into a blender container.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over milk; allow to soften for 5 minutes.
3. Heat 2/3 cup skim milk to boiling point.
4. Pour the heated milk into the blender bowl and blend until the gelatin dissolves.
5. Add egg yolks, 6 tbsp sugar, cocoa, and vanilla. Blend at medium speed until well mixed.
6. Add cottage cheese and blend until smooth.
7. Refrigerate until thick.
8. Beat egg whites; add remaining sugar and fold into chocolate mixture.
9. Mix crumbs and cinnamon.
10. Place in an 8-inch pie pan.
11. Carefully pour the chocolate mixture into the pie pan and refrigerate.
12. Only 105 calories per serving. From: Syd's Cookbook.
